n: The Tourney Field: Mounted Combat Tutorial

steps.t: Begin your instruction in how to ride a war-steed by speaking with Seoca.
Mount your war-steed near the outer track starting line.
Follow the direction of Seoca as you circle the tourney field and learn to control your steed. You must make two full circuits of the outer track in o…
Run the flags course as directed by Seoca. On the first round, you must pass through the blue flags. On the second round, you must pass through the re…
Run the flags course as directed by Seoca. On the first round, you must pass through the blue flags. On the second round, you must pass through the re…
Run the flags course as directed by Seoca. On the first round, you must pass through the blue flags. On the second round, you must pass through the re…
Speak with Seoca to begin the next training course.
Jump each of the fences as you ride around the track. If you miss a fence, your count will reset when you cross the start line and you can keep going.
Jump each of the fences as you ride around the track. If you miss a fence, your count will reset when you cross the start line and you can keep going.
Speak with Seoca near the jousting course in the middle of the field.
Speak with Seoca to complete your training.
